name: Crystal Beast Cobalt Eagle
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>宝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>玉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> コバルト・イーグル
desc: Once per turn: You can target 1 "Crystal Beast" card you control; place that target on top of the Deck. If this face-up card is destroyed in a Monster Zone, you can place it face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell, instead of sending it to the GY.
mnst_eff: Once per turn: You can target 1 "Crystal Beast" card you control; place that target on top of the Deck. If this face-up card is destroyed in a Monster Zone, you can place it face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell, instead of sending it to the GY.
eff: Once per turn: You can target 1 "Crystal Beast" card you control; place that target on top of the Deck. If this face-up card is destroyed in a Monster Zone, you can place it face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell, instead of sending it to the GY.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 2: The Duel Academy Years Mega Pack
Speed Duel GX: Duel Academy Box
Structure Deck: Legend of the Crystal Beasts

action: Places cards from the player's field on the top of the Deck
Places itself in Spell & Trap Zone
Places destroyed cards in Spell & Trap Zone
